features: Compatible Model:The 2 pack waterproof case built in HD tempered glass screen protector compatible with apple watch series 11/10 46mm case. Please choose the correct size according to your smartwatch model to purchase.

Waterproof Design:46mm hard PC case for apple watch screen protector adopts dual materials,it has high-strength PC shell with a built-in metal waterproof edge ring and tempered film,effectively prevent water, moisture and sweat from entering the screen,No need to remove case wipe moisture.Suitable for daily scenes like washing hands, shower, rainy days and water activities like swimming,diving,rafting,etc.

Full Protection:Premium hard PC material used for apple watch series 10 46mm case full cover the face front screen and edges,whitch can protect your watch to the greatest extent and prevent damage from scratches,falls and impacts.

Sensitive Touch:Our super clear & thin HD Tempered Glass PC screen protector cover for apple watch 10 case which presents original bright image quality and maintains original touch sensitivity,ensuring quick app launching.

Easy to Install:Face covers for apple watch case 46mm features precision cuts to snap on and take off easily,allowing you to access all controls,buttons,sensors and functions,is firm and secure.It can be charging without removing case.
